'''''Star Wars Adventures Magazine'' 2''' was the second issue of the [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] magazine, published in [[November]] [[2002]] as part of the monthly installment of the ''Star Wars Adventures'' membership kit. The issue centered around [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}

==Contents==
*"You Can Run, But You Can't Hide!"
*"Boba Fett! Boba Fett!"
*"Go Aboard ''Slave I''!"
*"Beyond Boba: A Guide to Bounty Hunters"
*"Chase to Geonosis!"
*Pull-out Poster
*"Visit Coruscant!"
*"All In a Day's Work: Bounty Hunter Crossword Puzzle"
*"Jango Speaks!"
*"Jango's Mandalorian Armor"
*"Who Is That?"
*"The Further Adventures of Boba Fett!"
*"Jango's Jumble"
*Answer Key
